title: Heraldry
description: Datapack for expanding Banner Pattern palette with new polished Prints, illustrated Tooltips and quality-of-life Banner/Shield features (including decorative variants!)
body:
# Choco's Heraldry!

Confused by which Loom Pattern corresponds to which Design's name? Frustrated by Banner Pattern's limited layers or boring options? Fret not!

This datapack introduces new Prints for Banners, authentic Heraldic terms for Ordinaries, Charges & Tinctures, miniature Icons accompanying Pattern Tooltips and minor QOL features such as equipping Banners above Playerhead or Banners/Patterns stacking upto 64!

<details>
<summary>Patterns & Prints (refer Gallery)</summary>

- **Striped Print** (requires Breeze Pattern): Pally, Barry, Bendy, Bendy Sinister, Bendy Acute Sinister, Bendy Acute, Chevronné, Chevronné Reverse, Guillemé Dexter, Guillemé Sinister
- **Ashen Print** (requires Skull Pattern): Gradient Abased, Gradient Enhanced, Gradient Dexter, Gradient Sinister
- **Checkered Print** (requires Creeper Pattern): Chequy, Componée, Gyronny, Lozengy, Lozengy-Barry, Lozengy-Barry Sinister, Lozengy-Pally, Lozengy-Pally Sinister, Lozengy-Bendy, Lozengy-Bendy Sinister
- **Indented Print** (requires Spire Pattern): Chief Indented, Base Indented, Indented Dexter, Indented Sinister, Dancetté Abased, Dancetté Enhanced, Dancetté Dexter, Dancetté Sinister
- **Mundane Prints** (available via Press):
  - Pairle, Pairle Reverse, nPile, Pile Reverse
  - Pallet Dexter, Pallet Sinister, Fess Abased, Fess Enhanced
  - Chevron, Chevron Reverse, Guillemet Dexter, Guillemet Sinister
  - Flaunch Dexter, Flaunch Sinister, Cartouche Dexter, Cartouche Sinister
  - Camp Enarched, Camp Embowed, Chief Enarched, Chief Embowed
  - Point Dexter Abased, Point Dexter Enhanced, Point Sinister Abased, Point Sinister Enhanced
  - Quarter Dexter Abased, Quarter Dexter Enhanced, Quarter Sinister Abased, Quarter Sinister Enhanced
- **Gilded Print** (requires Smithy Pattern): Bordure, Orle, Tressures
- **Spiral Print** (requires Whirl Pattern): Meandry Abased, Meandry Enhanced, Meandry Dexter, Meandry Sinister
- **Winter Print** (requires Floral Pattern): Sapiné Abased, Sapiné Enhanced, Sapiné Dexter, Sapiné Sinister
- **Fortress Print** (requires Skull Pattern): Épiné Abased, Épiné Enhanced, Épiné Dexter, Épiné Sinister, Rayonné Abased, Rayonné Enhanced, Rayonné Dexter, Rayonné Sinister
- **Castle Print** (requires Masonry Pattern): Rivenette Abased, Rivenette Enhanced, Rivenette Dexter, Rivenette Sinister, Palissado Abased, Palissado Enhanced, Palissado Dexter, Palissado Sinister
- **Solitaire Print** (requires Mojäng Pattern): Trefoil ♣, Carreau ✦, Cœur ♥, Pique ♠ 
- **Celestial Print** (requires Globe Pattern):
  - Aries ♈︎︎, Taurus ♉︎︎, Gemini ♊︎︎, Cancer ♋︎︎, Leo ♌︎︎, Virgo ♍︎︎, Libra ♎︎︎, Scorpio ♏︎︎, Saggittarius ♐︎︎, Capricorn ♑︎︎, Aquarius ♒︎︎, Pisces ♓︎︎
- **Special Prints** (requires corresponding Patterns):
  - Fretty, Frilly, Grillage (requires Masonry)
  - Snowcrest ❆, Selburose ✸ (requires Freeze)
  - Spiral ꩜, Vires ◎ (requires Whirl)
  - Triton, Tryzub (requires Indented)
  - Macabre ☠ (requires Skull)
  - Crescent ☽, Stellar ★ (requires Globe)
  - Annulet ◯, Mascles ◊, Lozenge ◆ (available via Loom)
  - Fleur de Lys ⚜, Quatrefoil, Maize, Millet (requires Floral)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Planned Features</summary>
  
- applying Banner to Boats for custom Sails (datapack)
- equipping Banner as cosmetic Cloak/Capes (datapack)
- retexture Loom into Printing Press (resourcepack)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Compatibility (60+ Banner Packs)</summary>

NOTE: Compat for Flags from [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), Shields from [Epic Knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) and Skateboards from [I Wanna Skate](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-wanna-skate) not yet implemented.
- Compatible with [Collection's Fields](https://modrinth.com/mod/collections-field) by [Trigam](https://modrinth.com/user/Trigam) and [SpookLass](https://modrinth.com/user/SpookLass)!
- Compatible with [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs), [Ice & Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) and [Rats](https://modrinth.com/mod/rats) by [Alexthe668](https://github.com/AlexModGuy)!
- Compatible with [Fossils and Archeology: Revival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fossils) by [ddinodan](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ddinodan/projects)!
- Compatible with [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) and [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) by [Vazkii](https://vazkii.net/)!
- Compatible with [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) by [Benimatic](https://www.curseforge.com/members/benimatic/projects)!
- Compatible with [Immersive Engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering) by [BluSunrize](https://www.curseforge.com/members/blusunrize/projects)!
- Compatible with [Megaman Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/megaman-armor-mod) by [Collecter128](https://github.com/Collecter128)!
- Compatible with [Middle-Earth](https://modrinth.com/mod/middle-earth) by [Jukoz](https://modrinth.com/user/Jukoz)!
- Compatible with [HyliaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/hylia_craft) by [ManasMods](https://modrinth.com/organization/manasmods)!
- Compatible with [Wizardry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/electroblobs-wizardry) by [Electroblob](https://www.curseforge.com/members/electroblob/projects)!
- Compatible with [Epic Knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) by [Magistu](https://github.com/Magistu)!
- Compatible with [EnemyBanner](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enemybanner) by [XiaoHuNao](https://www.curseforge.com/members/xiaohunao/projects)!
- Compatible with [Advanced Banners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-banners) by [hiimjustin000](https://www.curseforge.com/members/hiimjustin000/projects)!
- Compatible with [Additional Banners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-banners), [Archaeology Banners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archaeology-banners), [Runelic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/runelic), [Unown](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unown-font), [Nyctography](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyctography), [Pig Pen Cypher](https://modrinth.com/mod/pig-pen-cipher) and [Coins](https://modrinth.com/mod/coins-je) by [Darkhax](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/darkhaxdev/followers)!
- Compatible with [Banner Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/banneradditions) by [EliteAsian](https://github.com/EliteAsian123)!
- Compatible with [Blithe Banners](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blithe-banners) by [SageAxolotl](https://modrinth.com/user/SageAxolotl)!
- Compatible with [Blue Archive School Banners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blue-archive-school-banners) by [general_gunner](https://www.curseforge.com/members/general_gunner/projects)!
- Compatible with [Blue Archive Banner Patterns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blue-archive-banner-and-shield-patterns) by [spicywolfoffical](https://www.curseforge.com/members/spicywolfoffical/projects)!
- Compatible with [Blood on the Clocktower Banner Patterns](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/blood-on-the-clocktower-banner-patterns/) by [PaintTheFuture](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/paintthefuture/)!
- Compatible with [Banner Capes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-capes) by [VovaErofeev](https://modrinth.com/user/Vova_Erofeev)!
- Compatible with [Banner Text](https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-text) by [Snuzzle](https://modrinth.com/user/Snuzzle) and [Banner Text RUS](https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-text-rus) by [SMSka](https://modrinth.com/user/SMSka)!
- Compatible with [More Banner Patterns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-banner-patterns) by [Skottify](https://modrinth.com/user/Skottify)!
- Compatible with [Many More Banners](https://modrinth.com/datapack/many-more-banners) by [Wulfian](https://modrinth.com/user/wulfian) and [Moxvallix](https://modrinth.com/user/moxvallix)!
- Compatible with [Muki's Extra Banners](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mukis-extra-banners) by [MukiTanuki](https://modrinth.com/user/MukiTanuki)!
- Compatible with [Monkey Banners](https://modrinth.com/mod/monkey-banners) by [Beast135](https://modrinth.com/user/Beast135)!
- Compatible with [Nie's Avatar Banner Patterns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nies-avatar-banner-patterns) by [Nieadni](https://modrinth.com/user/Nieadni)!
- Compatible with [Nyf's Banner Patterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-banner-patterns) by [Nyfaria](https://modrinth.com/user/Nyfaria)!
- Compatible with [Homestuck Banner Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/homestuck-banner-pack-1-20-5-5771397/) by [ZephtHepto](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/zephthepto/)!
- Compatible with [Red Banners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/red-banners) by [SadGates](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sad_gates4368099/projects)!
- Compatible with [Pride Banners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pride-banners) by [MarcyCat](https://www.curseforge.com/members/marcycat/projects)!
- Compatible with [LGBTQ+ Flags](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lgbtqia+-flag-banners) by [Silabear](https://modrinth.com/user/Silabear)!
- Compatible with [UNO Reverse](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/uno-reverse-banner-pattern/) by [SonicFan1991](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/sonicfan_1991/)!
- Compatible with [Saphy Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/saphy-pack) by [Team Sapphire](https://modrinth.com/organization/team-sapphire)!
- Compatible with [Kobolds](https://modrinth.com/mod/kobolds) by [Jusey1](https://github.com/Jusey1)!
- Compatible with [Bloom & Doom](https://modrinth.com/mod/bloom-and-doom) by [29Naybla](https://modrinth.com/user/29Naybla)!
- Compatible with [Buzzier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees), [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms), [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity), [Atmospheric](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric), [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental) and [Neapolitan](https://modrinth.com/mod/neapolitan) by [Team Abnormals](https://modrinth.com/organization/teamabnormals)!
- Compatible with [Gipples Galore](https://modrinth.com/mod/gipples-galore) by [KingRolly](https://modrinth.com/user/KingRolly)!
- Compatible with [Nirvana](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nirvana) by [Yapetto](https://www.curseforge.com/members/yapetto/projects)!
- Compatible with [Windswept](https://modrinth.com/mod/windswept) by [Yapetto](https://modrinth.com/user/Yapetto) & [Rose](https://modrinth.com/user/roselotsofunderscores)!
- Compatible with [Digital Segments Seven](https://modrinth.com/mod/dseg7), [Tic-Tac-Toe Code](https://modrinth.com/mod/tictactoe-code), [Sheikah Font](https://modrinth.com/mod/sheikah-font) and [Stray Robot Font](https://modrinth.com/mod/stray-robot-font) by [Lykrast](https://modrinth.com/user/Lykrast)!
- Compatible with [Spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum) by [DaFuqs](https://modrinth.com/user/DaFuqs)!
- Compatible with [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) by [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar)!
- Compatible with [PenguinLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/penguin-lib) by [joshiejack](https://www.curseforge.com/members/joshiejack/projects)!

</details>

### Recommendations
- [Fields](https://modrinth.com/mod/collections-field) by [Team Collections](https://modrinth.com/organization/team-collections): awesome QOL mod with configurable Pattern layer limit, preview Loom tooltips, Hanging Banners or equipping Banners as Flagstaffs!

### Credits

- Thank you [Amaro_Lunático](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/amaro_lunatico/) for letting me recycle their Pattern symbols! Visit Amaro's [Projects Page](https://modrinth.com/user/Amaro_Lunatico) for excellent quality-of-life resourcepacks!

They were also a great help in deciding the implementation of certain prints!

### Other Resources
Visit [Choco's Heraldry](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/heraldry/) in PlanetMinecraft for reporting issues or discussions/recommendation/suggestions for the pack. Refer gallery and changelogs for the complete list of features changed/added.

### NOTE
Feel free to tailor this datapack for your personal preference, as long as you credit me and respective collaborators accordingly! However, you may not redistribute any of the assets, either commercially or otherwise, without obtaining prior permission first.
